must_not_detect.reason: Role/body term, not PII or MNPI by itself.

uncertain.reason: Legal basis reference for processing; may or may not be in scope for consent event detection.
Email present in URLencoded form; may not be caught by strict email regex.
Internal insider list identifier; marker may be useful but not directly covered by a specific rule.
Loan pricing expressed as spread; not an enumerated financial amount/percentage rule.
